overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character exploring an industrial washroom facility. The character approaches an NPC at a sink station, who reacts by looking up, before continuing through the dimly lit metal corridors toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial washroom entrance corridor with metal bathroom stalls

events.description: character enters the washroom area through a metal doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through a doorway into a dimly lit industrial washroom with metal stalls and exposed pipes

entered.detail: tall dark metal partition walls for bathroom stalls
row of industrial metal sinks with faucets against the far wall
large industrial pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters an industrial washroom through a metal doorway, walking past bathroom stall dividers. The environment features exposed ceiling pipes, metal flooring, and fluorescent lighting as the character approaches the sink area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wash station area with sinks and mirrors

events.description: character slows while approaching the NPC standing at the sink
NPC turns his head to look at the approaching player character

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping near a man using the sink, observing him as he turns to look

notable_agents.action: standing at a sink washing up, then turning to look at the player

entered.detail: spray-painted markings and tags on the metal wall behind the sinks
reflective mirror surface mounted above the sink area
long fluorescent light fixture on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wash station where an NPC stands at a sink. The NPC turns to look at the player as they near. Graffiti covers the metal walls behind the sinks, and fluorescent lights illuminate the industrial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit corridor leading to adjacent room

events.description: character resumes walking past the NPC toward the exit doorway
approaching the exit doorway with view to the next area

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPC and heading toward the far doorway where another figure in white is visible

notable_agents.action: remaining at the sink as the player passes by and moves toward the exit

entered.detail: arched metal doorway leading to the next corridor
person in white clothing visible through the far doorway

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the NPC and walks toward an exit doorway. Through the archway, a distant figure in white clothing is visible in the next room. The graffiti-covered wall slides to the right as the character advances through the industrial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial washroom that transitions into a dimly lit corridor leading toward another room. It begins as the character enters through a metal doorway, passing by bathroom stall dividers under exposed ceiling pipes and flickering fluorescent lighting. As the character approaches the sink area, the camera captures an NPC turning to look at them against a backdrop of graffiti-covered metal walls. The scene then shifts as the character moves past the NPC and advances toward an exit, where a graffiti-covered wall slides to the right to reveal a corridor. Finally, the camera pushes through the archway, bringing a distant figure in white clothing into view in the adjacent room.
